inline_comments.message:
How about this?


"Smaller ONAP container images footprint reduces resource consumption, time to deploy, time to heal, as well as scale out resources.

Minimizing the footprint of ONAP container images positively impacts the scalability and deployability of the ONAP platform.  

Experience migrating OOF/HAS image to Alpine Linux demonstrated reduction in image size of 70%. Other experiments in porting to smaller base images demonstrated reductions of up to 90% in image size."
